name: pae_risk_export_contract
description: Canonical export contract for the PAE risk tracker. It defines the minimum shared schema for API, agent and dashboard consumers.

fields.name: contract_id
fields.description: Unique contract identifier.

fields.name: process_id
fields.description: Public procurement process identifier.

fields.name: entity
fields.description: Contracting entity name.

fields.name: entity_nit
fields.description: Contracting entity tax identifier.

fields.name: supplier
fields.description: Awarded supplier or bidder name.

fields.name: supplier_nit
fields.description: Supplier tax identifier.

fields.name: department
fields.description: Department where the contract was executed.

fields.name: municipality
fields.description: Municipality where the contract was executed.

fields.name: object
fields.description: Short description of the contract object.

fields.name: modality
fields.description: Procurement modality.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current contract status or stage.

fields.name: initial_value
fields.description: Initial or reference contract value.

fields.name: final_value
fields.description: Final or awarded contract value.

fields.name: start_date
fields.description: Contract start date or signature date.

fields.name: end_date
fields.description: Contract end date when available.

fields.name: year
fields.description: Reference year used by the dataset.

fields.name: month
fields.description: Reference month used by the dataset.

fields.name: risk_score
fields.description: Deterministic risk score from 0 to 100.

fields.name: risk_level
fields.description: Risk bucket derived from the score.

fields.name: red_flags
fields.description: List of activated red flag codes or objects.

fields.name: evidence
fields.description: Evidence package that explains the score and the red flags.

fields.name: secop_url
fields.description: Public SECOP URL for the contract or process.

fields.name: recommended_action
fields.description: Deterministic review recommendation for the case.

fields.name: limitations
fields.description: Known data or traceability limitations for the case.
